subTitle: The members of Gokuldham society cross paths with Kamla Tai who believes that her secret is out. Later, Pinku keeps piling on lies to hide the truth.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Tapu Sena and society members pay a visit to Pinku, he is worried about his secret being revealed. Later, Champaklal finds out the truth about Pinku's parents.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal reveals that Kamla and Kevarchand are not biological parents of Pinku. Hearing this Tappu Sena is in disbelief and refuses to believe Champaklal. But when Champaklal reveals what he has heard, then Tappu Sena is disappointed with Pinku.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal realises that he crossed Pinku's line and feels a bit guilty. However, Pinku has a plan to leave them forever.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Kevarchand and Kamla inform Tappu Sena that Pinku is leaving India for Canada and shall never return again.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Pinku is on his way to Canada and Tapu Sena wants to stop him from boarding the flight at any cost.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tappu and Sonu are allowed without a ticket in the boarding area to find and stop Pinku before he boards the flight.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena's joy knows no bounds when Pinku greets them. They are overjoyed that Pinku is not going to Canada and is staying back. When Tapu Sena returns to Gokuldham with Pinku, Champaklal insists that no one should ask Pinku about his parents.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Pinku decides to talk with Champaklal about his parents. He reveals that his parents rarely visit him and he feels abandoned. Champaklal decides to take matter into his own hands and decides to adopt Pinku to teach a lesson to his parents.
